exercises.title: Merge two sorted lists
Why merge sort not quicksort for LL
exercises.instructions: Implement: Why merge sort not quicksort for LL.
exercises.expected_solution:
public class WhyMerge{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println("Array: O(1) random access → quicksort partition O(n) per level");System.out.println("LL: no random access → pivot swap is O(n) traverse each time");System.out.println("LL quicksort: O(n) per level, n levels → O(n²) average case");System.out.println("LL merge sort: find middle O(n), merge O(n) → O(n log n) always");System.out.println("Winner for LL: merge sort O(n log n) O(log n) space");}
}
